exceptions.reason: The test entrypoint installs ephemeral trust material and prepares bind-mounted result directories before tests.
mitigations: The entrypoint drops to pwuser before executing every test suite.
The container is short-lived and has no listening service.

exceptions.reason: End-to-end stack tests must inspect containers through the dedicated rootless Podman API.
mitigations: The socket belongs to the isolated test-runners account.
The test container is removed after each run.
